commands.review_summary:
The branch lets declared installed plugins register agent tool-result middleware and trusted tool policies, adds a `contracts.trustedToolPolicies` manifest contract, and updates docs and contract tests.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +228, Docs +21. Total +275 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main rejects the linked installed-plugin use case, and PR-head source shows a reproducible rollback gap when a declared installed trusted policy is registered before its plugin throws.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can add trusted-policy rollback coverage and align the diagnostic canaries before maintainer/security review resumes.
